## Checklist

- [ ] `swift test` passes

- [ ] Architecture rules in CONTRIBUTING.md followed
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, AGENTS.md) if public API or CLI flags changed
- [ ] `swift build -Xswiftc -warnings-as-errors` passes with 0 warnings
